generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm glad to see our leaders taking proactive steps to strengthen domestic security powers. The recent expansion of surveillance authorities has already helped prevent several potential threats. Critics who claim this undermines civil liberties are missing the bigger picture - we need these tools to stay ahead of evolving dangers. The alternative is leaving ourselves vulnerable to attacks we could have stopped. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurNations
